Manages vibration scores, intensity settings, and patterns with related data structures and functions.


## Files
- **[vibe_client.c](vibe_client.c.md)**: Manages vibration scores for different clients in the Pebble firmware.
- **[vibe_client.h](vibe_client.h.md)**: Defines the VibeClient enum and a function to get the vibe score based on alert preferences.
- **[vibe_intensity.c](vibe_intensity.c.md)**: Functions for managing vibration intensity settings, including getting, setting, and cycling intensities.
- **[vibe_intensity.h](vibe_intensity.h.md)**: Defines and manages vibration intensity levels with functions to get, set, and cycle through intensities.
- **[vibe_score.c](vibe_score.c.md)**: Implements functions for creating, validating, and managing vibration patterns in the Pebble firmware.
- **[vibe_score.h](vibe_score.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing and executing vibration patterns in firmware.
- **[vibe_score_info.c](vibe_score_info.c.md)**: Manages vibration score information, including retrieval and cycling of vibration alerts.
- **[vibe_score_info.h](vibe_score_info.h.md)**: Defines and manages VibeScoreId enumeration and related functions for handling vibe scores.
- **[vibes.def](vibes.def.md)**: Defines vibration patterns with unique IDs for different alert types in the Pebble firmware.
